title: PDB3D's Horse Leather Armor Cloak - FreshAnimations
description: Fresh animations version of Horse Leather Armor Cloak
body:
Discontinued due to changed to Freshanimations and not being able to figure out how to extract FreshAnimations animations anymore due to said changes.



**This version only works with fresh animations 1.9.4! for a non-fresh animations version, click** [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/horse-leather-armor-cloak)                                                            
You only need 1 version, don't use both at the same time.

Replaces Horse Leather Armor with a cloak version using a custom model and texture.

Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EntityModelFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) !

Requires [Fresh Animations! 1.9.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations/version/1.9.4)

![Side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fy1mBCh4/images/da09bc8b698625e67074bb9c717d0572c381e5be.png)

![White Leather Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fy1mBCh4/images/b34bab643d0d1433c5e67fe16d96135980f900df.png)

![Back](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fy1mBCh4/images/17447b9a3c037f62c1b807883ab61e64e7d779ff.png)
